scenarios.title: ML sidecar fails loud when ML_LOG_LEVEL is missing
scenarios.testCoverage: unit (Python): _check_required_config() lists ML_LOG_LEVEL in required keys; a missing/empty value exits sys.exit(1); proven by the ml/tests/test_main.py suite green under ./smackerel.sh test unit --python.

scenarios.title: ML sidecar applies a valid SST log level with no default fallback and no policy-exception marker
scenarios.testCoverage: unit (Python) + integration (file-system): valid ML_LOG_LEVEL is accepted and applied via logging.getLogger().setLevel; ml/app/main.py contains no os.environ.get('ML_LOG_LEVEL', <literal>) and no # smackerel:policy-exception marker; PythonNoDefaultsGuard real-corpus scan is clean at the real SST cap.

scenarios.title: config generation emits ML_LOG_LEVEL for dev and test
scenarios.testCoverage: integration (config-gen static): ./smackerel.sh config generate resolves services.ml.log_level and emits a non-empty ML_LOG_LEVEL= into config/generated/dev.env AND config/generated/test.env; the single env-render emission point also feeds the deploy bundle app.env.

scenarios.title: The committed baseline is clean at the real SST cap
scenarios.testCoverage: integration (file-system): every committed baseline exception validates clean via ValidateException at the real cap (90, read from config/smackerel.yaml); G067-A05-ml-log-level removed; PythonNoDefaultsGuard real-corpus produces zero findings at the real cap.

scenarios.title: The guard flags a future over-age exception at the real cap (adversarial, RED-if-reintroduced)
scenarios.testCoverage: integration (adversarial): a synthetic 162-day exception (the shape of the removed entry) is flagged G067-A07 at the real 90-day cap; an 80-day exception is NOT flagged; TestRealBaselineHasNoOverAgeExceptionsAtRealCap proven RED against the unfixed baseline then GREEN after removal, same session.
